zh.lifeSummary: 當Adela de Vexin於0974年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利時，她的父親Gautier II de Vexin30歲，母親Alix Senlis22歲。她和Albéric de Coucy至少有2個女兒。她去世於1022年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adela de Vexin于0974年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利时，她的父亲Gautier II de Vexin30岁，母亲Alix Senlis22岁。她和Albéric de Coucy至少有2个女儿。她去世于1022年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vexin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vane
meanings: variant of   Fayne   with southern English voicing of initial [f] to [v].

nameMeanings.name: Adela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

variants.name: Adella
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Adela de Vexin was born in 0974, in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Gautier II de Vexin, was 30 and her mother, Alix Senlis, was 22. She had at least 2 daughters with Albéric de Coucy. She died in 1022, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adela de Vexin est née en 0974, à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Gautier II de Vexin, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alix Senlis, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Albéric de Coucy. Elle est décédée en 1022, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adela de Vexin 0974 in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gautier II de Vexin 30 und ihre Mutter Alix Senlis 22. Sie hatte mit Albéric de Coucy mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1022 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adela de Vexin è nata il nel 0974 nel Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Gautier II de Vexin, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alix Senlis, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Albéric de Coucy. Morì nel 1022, nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adela de Vexinが0974年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで生まれた時，父Gautier II de Vexinは30歳，母Alix Senlisは22歳であった。彼女はAlbéric de Coucyとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1022年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adela de Vexin(이)가 0974년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gautier II de Vexin(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix Senlis(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Albéric de Coucy(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1022년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adela de Vexin nasceu em 0974, em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gautier II de Vexin, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alix Senlis, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Albéric de Coucy. Ela faleceu em 1022, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adela de Vexin родилась в 0974 г. в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gautier II de Vexin было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix Senlis, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Albéric de Coucy. Она умерла в 1022 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adela de Vexin nació en 0974, en Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gautier II de Vexin, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alix Senlis, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Albéric de Coucy. Murió en 1022, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 48 años.
